allow: Bash(python -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) # Print plan name and step count print\(''Plan Name:'', data.get\(''name'', ''N/A''\)\) print\(''Step Count:'', len\(data.get\(''steps'', []\)\)\) print\(\) # Print step names/descriptions for i, step in enumerate\(data.get\(''steps'', []\)\): title = '''' desc = '''' for node in step.get\(''nodes'', []\): if node.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': content = node.get\(''content'', ''''\) if not title and len\(content\) < 60: title = content print\(f''Step {i}: {step.get\(""name"", title or ""\(no name\)""\)}''\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\(''/tmp/raidplan.json''\)\); print\(''Keys:'', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''Plan keys:'', list\(data[''plan''].keys\(\)\) if ''plan'' in data else ''no plan key''\)")
Bash(bun -e "import { ALL_FIGHTS } from ''./tests/validate/data-loader''; console.log\(''Loaded'', ALL_FIGHTS.length, ''fights:'', ALL_FIGHTS.map\(f => f.label\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(bun --tsconfig tsconfig.test.json -e "import { ALL_FIGHTS, walkAllDescriptions, walkAllUrls, walkAllMechanics, getToggleOptionValues } from ''./tests/validate/data-loader''; let descCount = 0; for \(const d of walkAllDescriptions\(\)\) descCount++; let urlCount = 0; for \(const u of walkAllUrls\(\)\) urlCount++; let mechCount = 0; for \(const m of walkAllMechanics\(\)\) mechCount++; console.log\(''Fights: '' + ALL_FIGHTS.length\); console.log\(''Descriptions: '' + descCount\); console.log\(''URLs: '' + urlCount\); console.log\(''Mechanics: '' + mechCount\);")
